message:
fix(codegen): Improve PyValue wrapper tracking and assertion optimizations

PyValue wrapper fixes:
- Track wrapper_opened state in assign.zig to properly close PyValue.from() wrappers
- Fix early return paths to close wrappers before returning
- Fix BigInt conversion semicolon placement

Assertion optimizations:
- assertEqual(type(x), type(y)) uses @TypeOf comparison at comptime
- assertEqual(list(x), y) uses runtime.listEquals helper to avoid monomorphization

Runtime additions:
- Add listEquals() helper for efficient iterator-to-list comparison
- Avoids listFromAny anytype monomorphization overhead
